description_long: This object represents a child pedestrian with a slender build, depicted in a dynamic, mid-stride walking pose. The figure has a distinct head with short, straight hair, and the limbs are elongated and angular, suggesting movement. The child is dressed in a short-sleeve top and knee-length bottoms, with visible footwear on both feet. The clothing appears casual and suitable for everyday urban environments. The overall form is stylized, with exaggerated proportions and some visible distortions, particularly in the limbs and extremities. No accessories such as backpacks or hats are present, and the figure's posture conveys forward motion.
description: A stylized child pedestrian in a walking pose, wearing casual short-sleeve clothing and visible footwear, with short straight hair.
description_view_0: The child is seen from a front angle, showing the face, chest, and both arms extended, with the left leg forward.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the elongated limbs and the dynamic stride, with the head and torso partially obscured.
description_view_2: The back and left side of the child are visible, showing the hair and the rear of the clothing, with the right leg extended.
description_view_3: A rear angle focusing on the back of the head, shoulders, and both legs, with the left arm and leg more prominent.
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair with a side part
